baseline.notes: Run 49 (and Run 54 v2 reproduction) Rush field_crop only baseline: F1 0.417, keeper 0.430, highlights 0.446. Run 56 adds QL1 Pass 2 refinement (commit a5a41bf): for each Pass 1 candidate, run a sharper type-specific confirmation VLM call with 8 frames @ 1.5s spacing and a per-type evidence clause. Phase A (analyze_confidence_signal.py) showed VLM-emitted confidence is noise so refinement re-examines frames rather than filtering on conf.

targets.notes: Hypothesis: Pass 2 acts as precision filter, removing FPs that came from Pass 1's generic 9-type decision tree. Expect TP roughly preserved (60+ from Run 49's 65), FP cut substantially (Run 49 had 91, target ~50), precision 0.40 -> 0.55+, F1 0.42 -> 0.50+. Watch refinement.summary log for per-type confirmed/rejected ratios. If Pass 2 rejects too aggressively (TP drops below 50), the per-type evidence clauses are too strict and need tuning.

refinement_enabled.reason: Per-job flag in submission payload. Adds ~150 candidates × ~5s/call ≈ 12 min to scan. First test of QL1 Phase B.

notes: Run #56 (commit a5a41bf): QL1 Pass 2 refinement. Per-job flag refinement_enabled=true in submission. Pre-flight will verify refinement.start logs after Pass 1 completes. Default deploy unchanged (REFINEMENT_ENABLED=false in .env).
